# Coal Retreats

> Private-hire luxury chalet in the Louron Valley, French Pyrenees. Six en-suite bedrooms, up to 14 guests, private chef on request. Built for groups seeking world-class skiing, cycling and mountain adventure without the crowds of the big Alpine resorts.

Coal Retreats (L'Ancienne Poste) is an exclusive-use chalet in Avajan, a small village in the Louron Valley of the French Pyrenees. Part of the Coal & Co hospitality group. Every booking takes the whole property, no shared spaces.

## Location
- Village: Avajan, Louron Valley, Hautes-Pyrénées, France
- Nearest ski resort: Peyragudes (9 minutes by car)
- Other nearby resorts: Saint-Lary-Soulan, Piau-Engaly, Val Louron
- Nearest airport: Toulouse (1h 45min), Lourdes-Pyrénées (1h 15min), Pau (2h)
- Nearest train station: Lannemezan (35 min) — direct TGV from Paris
- Thermal spa: Balnéa (7 minutes)

## Property
- 6 en-suite bedrooms, sleeps up to 14
- Lounge and bar, dining room, fully equipped kitchen
- Sun terrace with valley views
- Home cinema
- Ski and bike storage
- Hot tub / wellness area
- South-facing garden
- Classified 4★ by the French Ministry of Tourism

## Offering
- **Self-Catered**: Exclusive use of the entire chalet, flexible stays from short breaks to weekly. Price on application.
- **Fully Catered**: Private chef and host, daily breakfast, 4-course dinners with wine, dedicated hosting team, optional chauffeur transfers. From £10,000 per week.
- **Corporate retreats** and **group bookings** — bespoke packages on request.

## Activities
### Winter
- Ski Peyragudes (9 min drive) — 60km of piste, linked with Peyresourde
- Off-piste and ski touring guides on request
- Ski Set partner discount on rental
- Cross-country, snowshoeing, hot-air balloon over the peaks
- Balnéa Pyrenean thermal spa

### Summer
- Cycling the legendary Tour de France cols (Col de Peyresourde, Col d'Aspin, Col du Tourmalet, Col d'Azet all within striking distance)
- Mountain biking at Peyragudes Bike Park
- Altitude hiking, mountain lakes (Lac de Génos-Loudenvielle on the doorstep)
- Paragliding, via ferrata
- Balnéa Spa and Luchon thermal spa
- Family-friendly activities — lake swimming, tree-top adventure parks, bike paths

## Food and Drink
- Private chef (on request) celebrates Pyrenean cuisine: garbure soup, Tarbais beans, black pig, local duck, mountain cheeses, with global influence
- Wine from local suppliers
- All dietary requirements catered
- Village restaurants and bakery a short drive away
- Fully equipped kitchen for self-caterers

## Who it's for
- Groups of friends looking for a private ski house
- Families wanting one place that works for all ages
- Corporate retreats and off-sites (14 pax capacity)
- Cycling groups chasing the Pyrenean cols
- Wedding parties and milestone celebrations

## Contact
- Bookings: bookings@coalretreats.com
- Site: https://www.coalretreats.com
- Part of: Coal & Co hospitality group

- [Home](https://www.coalretreats.com/): Chalet overview, the story, pricing, enquiry
